verification_gate: Every runtime frontdoor resolves to the intended profile package, generated state is reproducible, consumers are migrated, shadows are archived, and rollback restores the prior generation.

clause_1_every_runtime_frontdoor_resolve.intended_profile_package: Yazelix plus Nix foundation profile (lifeos-foundation-yzx / yazelix_flexnetos_foundation), source path:/home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/src/yazelix, defining task FOUNDATION-001
frontdoors_enumerated: yzx (Yazelix v17.9), envctl 0.1.0, meta 0.2.22 + meta-git/meta-mcp/meta-project/meta-release/meta-rust, bun 1.3.14 + bunx, nu 0.112.2, git 2.54.0, python3 3.14.4
node, cargo, rustc, yazelix command name, usr nu, usr xclip, usr wl-copy (currently missing; must become profile-provided)
clause_1_every_runtime_frontdoor_resolve.evidence: state/nix_surface_report.json runtime_frontdoor_update (ambient_codex, clean_frontdoor_codex, tool_versions, missing_ambient_or_usr_tools, nix_profile_active); 1.0_VISION/ARCHITECTURE_BLUEPRINT_COMPATIBILITY.md GitKB navigation contract; state/usr_surface_report.json

clause_2_generated_state_is_reproducible.source_pins: root flake.nix + flake.lock (MISSING today per nix_surface_report.root_flake -> closed by FOUNDATION-003-A) + per-peer rust-toolchain.toml + Cargo.lock + manifests/provenance.json
clause_2_generated_state_is_reproducible.generated_runtime: envctl projection (PostgreSQL -> filesystem via module_path, read-only) + Nix static musl build (x86_64-unknown-linux-musl) portable prefix
clause_2_generated_state_is_reproducible.reproducibility_verification: bun scripts/verify-planning-spine.mjs = pass (observed 2026-07-13T03:52:13Z, state/verification_runtime_report.json) + deterministic-rebuild digest equality + pinned nix-profile generation

consumer_classes_migrated: shell and systemd environment (PATH ordering, exported env incl. CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT)
profile source URLs and runtime frontdoors
absolute path references and live process cwd/exe references
clause_3_consumers_are_migrated.migration_policy: archive owner input first, retarget to intended profile / canonical $META_ROOT frontdoor, restart only affected consumers; every retargeted name re-provided so no capability lost

clause_4_shadows_are_archived.policy: archive-first, read-only ownership: no move/delete/cleanup; bytes retained under checksum manifest (RECOVERY-004 / PRESERVE-001 charter)
active_shadows_archived: FOUNDATION-003-F legacy $META_ROOT/.toolchains rustup bridge (portability gap G4)
FOUNDATION-003-G stray /home/flexnetos/lifeos codex-harness ledger + stale CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT env (RECOVERY-004 manifest 799e8648...)

FOUNDATION-003-H parent /home/flexnetos/lifeos control-plane residue (kept archived under 20260710T224253Z-meta-authority-relocation, PRESERVE-001.proof manifest ab12117a..., 0 unarchived destructive actions)

clause_5_rollback_restores_the_prior_gen.mechanism: meta git snapshot (multi-repo checkpoint) + nix profile rollback to prior generation + archived-runtime-plan restore
clause_5_rollback_restores_the_prior_gen.rollback_plan: Restore the archived runtime plan; active runtime remains unchanged.
clause_5_rollback_restores_the_prior_gen.guarantee: prior generation always restorable because retirement is archive-first (no deletion) and blocked_paths forbid profile upgrade / launcher mutation / generated-runtime edits / shadow deletion

gate_result.store_001_alignment: Runtime/profile/generated-runtime is the STORE-001 derived-projections class: PostgreSQL canonical, envctl projection read-only and deterministically regenerable from module_path, redb transient, AgentDB per-agent cognition. No store is reclassified; the family only resolves the derived runtime layer to one intended profile and archives shadows without loss.

proof_summary: FOUNDATION-003 defines the runtime reproducibility and archive-first shadow-retirement plan as a 10-item task family, and every one of the gate's five clauses is grounded in named evidence, not invented. Clause 1 (frontdoors): the intended profile package is the Yazelix plus Nix foundation profile (lifeos-foundation-yzx / yazelix_flexnetos_foundation, source path:/home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/src/yazelix, owned by FOUNDATION-001); the real frontdoor set is enumerated from state/nix_surface_report.json (codex, yzx, envctl, meta and its five plugins, bun/bunx, nu, git, python3) plus the seven currently-missing tools (node, cargo, rustc, yazelix, usr nu, usr xclip, usr wl-copy), with codex's alpha.34 toolbin shadow and the FlexNetOS/usr/bin overlay named as the frontdoors that must be made to resolve to the profile (FOUNDATION-003-B). Clause 2 (reproducibility): the source->package->profile->generated-runtime chain is pinned, closing the missing root flake.nix/flake.lock gap (nix_surface_report.root_flake) via FOUNDATION-003-A and proving byte-identical envctl projection + Nix static musl rebuild via FOUNDATION-003-C, anchored to the passing verifier receipt in state/verification_runtime_report.json. Clause 3 (consumers): the six PRESERVE-001-D consumer classes migrate onto the intended profile via FOUNDATION-003-I with archive-then-retarget and no capability loss. Clause 4 (shadows): five real active shadow owners are archived, never deleted, under the RECOVERY-004/PRESERVE-001 archive-first charter (ambient toolbin codex alpha.34, FlexNetOS/usr/bin overlay, $META_ROOT/.toolchains bridge G4, the stray /home/flexnetos/lifeos codex-harness ledger driven by a stale CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT, and the parent-control-plane residue already archived under 20260710T224253Z-meta-authority-relocation). Clause 5 (rollback): FOUNDATION-003-J proves prior-generation restore via meta git snapshot + nix profile rollback + archived-plan restore, honoring the family rollback_plan. STORE-001 is respected: the runtime layer is the derived-projections class with PostgreSQL canonical and the projection read-only, so nothing is reclassified. This is a definition task only; no profile upgrade, launcher mutation, generated-runtime edit, or shadow deletion was performed, and all reads were non-mutating.
